data.title: RED test: Gate 1b integration in fix-bug SKILL.md
data.description:
Create tests/skills/test_fix_bug_gate_1b.py with structural validation tests.

Tests:
1. test_gate_1b_section_exists — SKILL.md contains Gate 1b section
2. test_gate_1b_dispatches_script — references gate-1b-feature-request-check.py
3. test_gate_1b_fires_after_ambiguous — documents conditional on Gate 1a ambiguous
4. test_gate_1b_skipped_when_not_ambiguous — documents skip for intent-aligned/contradicting
5. test_gate_1b_primary_signal — references signal_type primary
6. test_gate_1b_pre_investigation — appears before investigation dispatch
7. test_gate_1b_failure_fallback — documents graceful degradation

Docstring: structural metadata validation — design contract verification.
Append tests/skills/test_fix_bug_gate_1b.py to comma-separated value list on the existing plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md: line in .test-index.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file exists
  Verify: test -f tests/skills/test_fix_bug_gate_1b.py
- [ ] At least 7 test functions
  Verify: grep -c 'def test_' tests/skills/test_fix_bug_gate_1b.py | awk '{exit ($1 < 7)}'
- [ ] .test-index updated
  Verify: grep 'fix-bug/SKILL.md' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index | grep -q 'test_fix_bug_gate_1b'
